OpenShell FS bridge writes stay pinned to the sandbox mount root 

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: openclaw (npm)
- Affected versions: <= 2026.4.21
- Fixed version: 2026.4.22

## Impact
A time-of-check/time-of-use race around OpenShell sandbox filesystem writes could let a symlink swap redirect a write outside the intended local mount root.

## Fix
OpenShell write paths now validate the canonical target against the mount root, reject unsafe symlink parents and symlink leaves for writes, and use root-scoped write helpers before syncing to the remote sandbox.

## Fix Commit(s)
- 7be82d4fd1193bcb7e44ee38838f00bf924ffa76

## Verification
- The fix commit is contained in the public v2026.4.22 tag.
- openclaw@2026.4.22 is published on npm and the compiled package contains the fix.
- Focused regression coverage for this path passed before publication.

Thanks @VladimirEliTokarev for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.02442, "percentile": 0.82193}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wppj-c6mr-83jj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T20:57:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wppj-c6mr-83jj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wppj-c6mr-83jj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44112"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-04T20:57:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-wppj-c6mr-83jj", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/7be82d4fd1193bcb7e44ee38838f00bf924ffa76", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44112", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-symlink-swap-race-condition-in-openshell-fs-bridge-writes", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wppj-c6mr-83jj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-wppj-c6mr-83jj", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: OpenShell FS bridge writes stay pinned to the sandbox mount root", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T13:36:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wppj-c6mr-83jj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.4.21"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: OpenShell FS bridge writes stay pinned to the sandbox mount root
